title: Stuff To Mess With: Remodernized
description: A version of the first mod I ever made, remade for 1.20.1 and now on Modrinth! It includes a new magic system, powerful tools and armor, artifacts, and dangerous trials with unique rewards!
body:
Welcome to a 1.20.1 version of the mod Stuff to Mess With (you can find the originals on Curseforge)! This mod includes a huge new magic system, involving wands and totems for new ways of combat and getting powerful player buffs! There is new gear such as blazed gear, found in the Nether, or mystical godlium, found in the End.

Don't forget about the new trials introduced with this iteration of the mod! Trials provide a new and challenging way to progress and discover new and special equipment to help you on your journey! Find guns, unique armor, and even armor trims for decoration!

There's a new way to store items as well, allowing for storing entire storage systems' worth of materials in a single block of space!

To go along with all the exploration and combat you will be involved in, there are new foods and powerful ways of travel! Create highways going 50 blocks a second, or set up warp stations at all of your bases! Share a pizza with your friends, or fight over the last few potato chips! There's something for everyone in Stuff to Mess With: Remodernized!
